# Playwright + LLM 自然语言 UI 自动化框架方案设计

## 一、整体架构

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     自然语言用例 (YAML/MD)                    │
│   例: "打开百度首页 → 输入'playwright' → 点击搜索按钮"        │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │  用例解析器 Parser   │  拆分步骤、提取元数据
                └──────────┬──────────┘
                           │
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │  脚本缓存层 Cache    │◄─── 命中则跳过 LLM
                │  (hash → script)    │
                └──────────┬──────────┘
                           │ miss
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │   LLM 翻译器         │  自然语言 → Playwright 动作
                │  (Prompt + Context) │  (含页面 DOM 快照)
                └──────────┬──────────┘
                           │
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │   动作校验/规范化     │  JSON Schema 校验
                └──────────┬──────────┘
                           │
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │  Playwright 执行器   │  按步骤执行 + 日志
                └──────────┬──────────┘
                           │
                ┌──────────▼──────────┐
                │  报告 & 截图 & Trace │
                └─────────────────────┘
```

## 二、核心模块设计

### 1. 用例输入层（natural_cases/）
- **格式**：YAML（推荐，结构化好）或 Markdown
- **样例**：
  ```yaml
  name: 百度搜索
  url: https://www.baidu.com
  steps:
    - 在搜索框输入 "playwright"
    - 点击 "百度一下" 按钮
    - 断言结果列表包含 "Playwright"
  ```

### 2. LLM 翻译层（llm_translator/）
- **职责**：把单步自然语言 → 标准化 Action JSON
- **关键设计**：
  - **不直接生成代码字符串**，而是生成**结构化 Action**（避免 eval 注入、便于校验）
  - 给 LLM 注入当前页面 DOM 精简快照（可选，对动态定位有帮助）
  - 输出 JSON Schema 强约束
- **Action 标准结构**：
  ```json
  {
    "action": "click | fill | goto | assert | wait | hover | select",
    "locator": {
      "strategy": "role | text | label | css | xpath | testid",
      "value": "button[name='百度一下']",
      "options": {"exact": false}
    },
    "value": "playwright",   // fill 时的输入值
    "assertion": {"type": "contains", "expected": "Playwright"},
    "description": "点击搜索按钮"
  }
  ```

### 3. 脚本缓存层（script_cache/）
- **目的**：相同用例步骤不重复调 LLM，节省成本 + 提速 + 可回归
- **存储结构**：
  ```
  script_cache/
    ├── {case_name}/
    │   ├── case.meta.json        # 用例哈希、版本、生成时间
    │   ├── step_001.json         # 每步 Action JSON
    │   ├── step_002.json
    │   └── playwright_script.py  # 可选：聚合后的可执行脚本
  ```
- **缓存键**：`hash(用例名 + 步骤文本 + 目标URL)`
- **失效策略**：
  - 用例文本变更 → 自动失效该步
  - 执行失败超过 N 次 → 标记失效，下次重新让 LLM 生成
  - 支持 `--force-regenerate` 强制刷新

### 4. 执行引擎（runner/）
- **逐步执行 + 详细日志**（核心诉求 2）
- 每步打印格式：
  ```
  [Step 02] 点击 "百度一下" 按钮
    ├─ Action  : click
    ├─ Locator : role=button[name="百度一下"]
    ├─ Resolved: <button id="su" class="bg s_btn">百度一下</button>
    ├─ Status  : ✔ PASS (123ms)
    └─ Screenshot: reports/run_20260521_103000/step_02.png
  ```
- 失败时自动：截图 + 保存 DOM + 记录 Trace

### 5. 自愈机制（可选但推荐）
- 元素定位失败时 → 把错误 + 当前 DOM 回传 LLM → 让其重新给定位器 → 重试 1~2 次 → 仍失败则真正失败
- 自愈成功后**回写缓存**，下次直接用新定位器

## 三、目录结构建议

```
project/
├── natural_cases/              # 自然语言用例
│   └── baidu_search.yaml
├── script_cache/               # LLM 生成的 Action JSON（持久化）
│   └── baidu_search/
│       ├── case.meta.json
│       └── step_001.json
├── core/
│   ├── parser.py               # 用例解析
│   ├── llm_client.py           # LLM 调用 (Claude/GPT)
│   ├── translator.py           # NL → Action
│   ├── cache.py                # 缓存读写
│   ├── executor.py             # Playwright 执行
│   ├── locator_resolver.py     # locator JSON → Playwright Locator
│   ├── logger.py               # 结构化日志（核心诉求 2）
│   └── self_heal.py            # 自愈
├── reports/                    # 执行报告 & 截图 & trace
├── config.yaml                 # LLM key、超时、重试策略
└── run.py                      # 入口
```

## 四、关键技术决策

| 决策点 | 推荐方案 | 理由 |
|---|---|---|
| LLM 输出形式 | **结构化 JSON Action**，非代码字符串 | 安全、可校验、易调试、易缓存 |
| 定位器优先级 | role > testid > label > text > css > xpath | 鲁棒性递减，符合 Playwright 官方推荐 |
| 缓存粒度 | **单步**而非整个用例 | 单步改动不影响其他步骤复用 |
| LLM 模型 | Claude Sonnet 4.6 / GPT-4 级别 | 步骤理解准确度高 |
| 页面上下文 | 按需注入精简 DOM (可见元素 + role/text/id) | 提升定位准确度，控制 token |
| 断言 | 独立 action 类型，支持 contains/equals/visible/count | 与操作分离更清晰 |

## 五、执行流程示例

1. `python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml`
2. Parser 拆出 3 个步骤
3. 对每步：先查 `script_cache/baidu_search/step_xxx.json`
   - 命中 → 直接载入 Action
   - 未命中 → 调 LLM → 校验 → 写缓存
4. Executor 顺序执行 Action：
   - 解析 locator → 调用 Playwright API → 打印日志 → 截图
5. 生成 HTML 报告（含每步定位器、动作、截图、耗时、trace 链接）

## 六、可扩展点

- 并行执行（多 worker）
- 数据驱动（用例参数化）
- 接入 CI（命令行返回码 + JUnit XML）
- Web UI 管理用例 & 查看报告
- 多浏览器矩阵（Chromium/Firefox/WebKit）

---

确认这个方向 OK 的话，我可以接着：
1. 细化某个模块（如 LLM Prompt 模板、Action Schema 定义）
2. 直接进入编码阶段，按模块逐步实现

# 生成的 Playwright 脚本长什么样

我先澄清一个关键设计点：**我们存的不是 Python 代码字符串，而是结构化 Action JSON**。这样更安全、可校验、可缓存。但最终执行时它等价于一段 Playwright 代码。

下面用一个完整例子说明三种形态：**自然语言用例 → 缓存的 Action JSON → 真实执行的 Playwright 调用**。

---

## 一、输入：自然语言用例

`natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml`
```yaml
name: 百度搜索playwright
url: https://www.baidu.com
steps:
  - 在搜索框输入 "playwright"
  - 点击 "百度一下" 按钮
  - 等待搜索结果出现
  - 断言结果列表中包含 "Playwright"
```

---

## 二、LLM 生成并缓存的 Action JSON（核心存储产物）

`script_cache/baidu_search/case.meta.json`
```json
{
  "case_name": "百度搜索playwright",
  "case_hash": "a1b2c3d4e5",
  "url": "https://www.baidu.com",
  "generated_at": "2026-05-21T10:30:00",
  "llm_model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "steps_count": 4
}
```

`script_cache/baidu_search/step_001.json`
```json
{
  "step_no": 1,
  "raw_text": "在搜索框输入 \"playwright\"",
  "action": "fill",
  "locator": {
    "strategy": "role",
    "role": "textbox",
    "name": "搜索",
    "fallback": [
      {"strategy": "css", "value": "#kw"},
      {"strategy": "xpath", "value": "//input[@name='wd']"}
    ]
  },
  "value": "playwright",
  "timeout_ms": 5000,
  "description": "在百度搜索框输入查询词"
}
```

`script_cache/baidu_search/step_002.json`
```json
{
  "step_no": 2,
  "raw_text": "点击 \"百度一下\" 按钮",
  "action": "click",
  "locator": {
    "strategy": "role",
    "role": "button",
    "name": "百度一下",
    "fallback": [{"strategy": "css", "value": "#su"}]
  },
  "timeout_ms": 5000
}
```

`script_cache/baidu_search/step_003.json`
```json
{
  "step_no": 3,
  "raw_text": "等待搜索结果出现",
  "action": "wait_for",
  "locator": {"strategy": "css", "value": "#content_left"},
  "state": "visible",
  "timeout_ms": 10000
}
```

`script_cache/baidu_search/step_004.json`
```json
{
  "step_no": 4,
  "raw_text": "断言结果列表中包含 \"Playwright\"",
  "action": "assert",
  "locator": {"strategy": "css", "value": "#content_left"},
  "assertion": {
    "type": "contains_text",
    "expected": "Playwright",
    "ignore_case": true
  }
}
```

---

## 三、执行时等价的 Playwright 代码

Executor 读取上面的 JSON 后，**实际跑的就是这些 Playwright 调用**（伪代码展示等价形式）：

```python
# step 01: fill
page.get_by_role("textbox", name="搜索").fill("playwright", timeout=5000)

# step 02: click
page.get_by_role("button", name="百度一下").click(timeout=5000)

# step 03: wait_for
page.locator("#content_left").wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)

# step 04: assert
expect(page.locator("#content_left")).to_contain_text("Playwright", ignore_case=True)
```

---

## 四、可选：导出成"纯 Playwright 脚本"（人类可读 / 可直接复用）

为了方便 review 和外部使用，框架还会**额外**导出一份聚合脚本：

`script_cache/baidu_search/playwright_script.py`
```python
# Auto-generated from natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
# Generated at: 2026-05-21 10:30:00 by claude-sonnet-4-6
# DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — edit the YAML and re-generate

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect

def run_baidu_search(page):
    # Step 1: 在搜索框输入 "playwright"
    page.get_by_role("textbox", name="搜索").fill("playwright")

    # Step 2: 点击 "百度一下" 按钮
    page.get_by_role("button", name="百度一下").click()

    # Step 3: 等待搜索结果出现
    page.locator("#content_left").wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)

    # Step 4: 断言结果列表中包含 "Playwright"
    expect(page.locator("#content_left")).to_contain_text(
        "Playwright", ignore_case=True
    )

if __name__ == "__main__":
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)
        page = browser.new_page()
        page.goto("https://www.baidu.com")
        run_baidu_search(page)
        browser.close()
```

---

## 五、执行时的实时日志（核心诉求 2）

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Case: 百度搜索playwright   |   Cache: HIT (4/4 steps)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

[Step 01] 在搜索框输入 "playwright"
  ├─ Action  : fill
  ├─ Locator : role=textbox[name="搜索"]
  ├─ Value   : "playwright"
  ├─ Resolved: <input id="kw" name="wd" class="s_ipt">
  ├─ Status  : ✔ PASS (87ms)
  └─ Shot    : reports/20260521_103000/step_01.png

[Step 02] 点击 "百度一下" 按钮
  ├─ Action  : click
  ├─ Locator : role=button[name="百度一下"]
  ├─ Resolved: <input type="submit" id="su" value="百度一下">
  ├─ Status  : ✔ PASS (134ms)
  └─ Shot    : reports/20260521_103000/step_02.png

[Step 03] 等待搜索结果出现
  ├─ Action  : wait_for(state=visible)
  ├─ Locator : css=#content_left
  ├─ Status  : ✔ PASS (412ms)
  └─ Shot    : reports/20260521_103000/step_03.png

[Step 04] 断言结果列表中包含 "Playwright"
  ├─ Action  : assert.contains_text
  ├─ Locator : css=#content_left
  ├─ Expected: "Playwright" (ignore_case)
  ├─ Actual  : "...Playwright 是一个用于 Web 测试..."
  ├─ Status  : ✔ PASS (52ms)
  └─ Shot    : reports/20260521_103000/step_04.png

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Total: 4 passed, 0 failed   |   Duration: 0.69s
  Report: reports/20260521_103000/index.html
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

---

## 六、为什么选"Action JSON"而不是"直接存 Python 代码"

| 维度 | Action JSON ✅ | 存 Python 代码字符串 ❌ |
|---|---|---|
| 安全 | 不执行任意代码 | 需要 `exec()`，注入风险 |
| 校验 | JSON Schema 强校验 | 只能跑起来才知道对不对 |
| 调试 | 字段级日志、定位失败可定向自愈 | 黑盒，出错难定位 |
| 缓存复用 | 单步独立缓存 | 整段脚本耦合 |
| 多语言 | 同一份 JSON 可生成 py/ts/java | 绑死一种语言 |
| LLM 输出稳定性 | 结构化输出准确率高 | 代码字符串易出语法错 |

**人类要看的可读脚本** → 由 Action JSON **额外导出**一份 `.py`（上面第四节），两全其美。

---

1. 把 **Action Schema** 完整列出来（所有 action 类型、字段约束）
2. 把 **LLM Prompt 模板** 写出来（决定翻译质量的核心）
3. 直接开始写代码

_**User (2026-05-21 07:19:22Z)**_

page.get_by_role("textbox", name="搜索").fill("playwright", timeout=5000) 为什么不直接写成这种形式呢

---

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:20:10Z)**_

# 好问题，这是一个关键的设计权衡

直接生成 `page.get_by_role(...).fill(...)` 这种**代码字符串**确实更直观、也更短。但在「LLM 生成 + 长期维护」这个场景下，**代码字符串方案有几个硬伤**。我把两种方案对比清楚，你来决定。

---

## 方案 A：直接存 Playwright 代码字符串

```json
{
  "step_no": 1,
  "code": "page.get_by_role(\"textbox\", name=\"搜索\").fill(\"playwright\", timeout=5000)"
}
```
执行时：`exec(step["code"])`

## 方案 B：存 Action JSON（我之前推荐的）

```json
{
  "action": "fill",
  "locator": {"strategy": "role", "role": "textbox", "name": "搜索"},
  "value": "playwright"
}
```
执行时：`page.get_by_role("textbox", name="搜索").fill("playwright")`

---

## 两种方案的硬碰硬对比

### 1️⃣ 安全性 —— 这是最大的问题

```python
# LLM 万一生成了这样的"脚本"，你 exec 就完了：
"code": "page.goto('xxx'); import os; os.system('rm -rf /')"
```
- **A 方案**：必须 `exec()` 执行字符串，等于把 LLM 当成可信代码作者。LLM 可能被 prompt injection 攻击（比如页面里藏一段恶意文本），也可能"幻觉"出危险代码。
- **B 方案**：只认白名单 action（`fill/click/goto/...`），任何超出 schema 的内容直接拒绝，**根本没有 exec 入口**。

> 即便你信任 LLM，**用户用例的文本**也可能被注入攻击。这是企业级框架不能让的底线。

---

### 2️⃣ 校验能力 —— 出错时间点完全不同

| 场景 | A 代码字符串 | B Action JSON |
|---|---|---|
| LLM 拼错方法名 `filll` | **运行时才报错**，崩在浏览器里 | **生成时 schema 校验就拦截**，重新生成 |
| LLM 漏了引号、括号不匹配 | 运行时 SyntaxError | JSON 解析阶段就失败 |
| LLM 用了不支持的参数 | 跑到一半挂掉 | schema 不通过，零成本拦截 |

**B 方案把错误左移**，省下大量"跑了 30 秒才发现第 5 步语法错"的时间。

---

### 3️⃣ 日志和可观测性 —— 直接影响你的核心诉求 2

你要求"**每一步打印 locator 和 action**"。

```python
# A 方案：拿到的是一坨字符串，你要打印 locator 怎么办？
"page.get_by_role('textbox', name='搜索').fill('playwright')"
# 只能正则解析，还得处理转义、嵌套、链式调用...复杂且脆弱

# B 方案：字段就在那里，直接读
log(f"Locator: role={action.locator.role}[name={action.locator.name}]")
log(f"Action: {action.action}")
log(f"Value: {action.value}")
```
B 方案天然支持结构化日志，A 方案要反向解析自己的代码字符串，得不偿失。

---

### 4️⃣ 自愈机制 —— 元素定位失败时

定位 `role=textbox[name="搜索"]` 失败时，框架要做的是：

1. 拿当前页面 DOM 重新让 LLM 给一个新的 locator
2. **只替换 locator 部分**，其他不动
3. 重试

```python
# B 方案：精准替换
action.locator = new_locator_from_llm
retry(action)

# A 方案：你得让 LLM 重写整行代码，然后再 exec，再校验...
# 而且 LLM 可能"顺手"改了别的参数，引入新 bug
```

---

### 5️⃣ 缓存命中率 & 维护

```yaml
# 用例从这个：
- 在搜索框输入 "playwright"

# 改成这个（只改了值）：
- 在搜索框输入 "selenium"
```

- **B 方案**：locator 不变，只更新 `value` 字段，**甚至不需要再调 LLM**
- **A 方案**：整行代码字符串变了，缓存 miss，重新调 LLM 翻译

参数化、数据驱动测试时，B 方案优势会被放大。

---

### 6️⃣ 跨语言 / 跨工具

```
            Action JSON (B)
                 │
       ┌─────────┼─────────┐
       ▼         ▼         ▼
  Playwright  Selenium  Cypress
   (Python)    (Java)    (JS)
```

同一份用例缓存能驱动多种执行器；A 方案绑死 Python + Playwright。

---

## 那 A 方案有没有优点？

有，**两条**：

1. **可读性更好**：人看 `page.click("#su")` 比看 JSON 直观
2. **写起来更短**：少一层抽象

但这两个优点我们用一个折中方案就能拿到 👇

---

## 折中方案：B 为执行格式，A 为产物

- **存储 & 执行**：用 Action JSON（B）
- **额外导出**一份纯 Playwright `.py` 给人看（上一轮回复里的 `playwright_script.py`）

```
LLM ─→ Action JSON (执行用)
         │
         └─→ 导出 .py 脚本 (给人看 / 外部复用)
```

这样：
- ✅ 安全：执行路径不碰字符串
- ✅ 校验：schema 卡在前面
- ✅ 日志：字段级结构化打印
- ✅ 自愈：精准替换 locator
- ✅ 可读：还是有一份 `.py` 可以审查、可以单独跑

---

## 一句话总结

> **"给机器执行的" 用 Action JSON，"给人看的" 导出成 Python 脚本**。
> 不是为了抽象而抽象，是为了安全、可校验、可自愈、可观测这四件事。

---

如果你的场景**完全可信**（内部工具、用例自己写、不接外部输入、也不需要自愈），其实 A 方案也能跑，只是后期扩展会受限。

你倾向哪种？我可以按你选的方案继续往下细化。

---

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:21:42Z)**_

# 对，本质上就是把 Playwright API 收敛成一个有限集合

你说到点子上了。LLM 不需要"会写任意 Playwright 代码"，它只需要在**一个我们预定义的方法集合**里做选择题。这个集合就是我们的"DSL"。

下面把这个集合明确列出来。

---

## 一、Locator 方法（定位元素）—— 7 个就够

| 我们的 strategy | 对应 Playwright 调用 | 适用场景 |
|---|---|---|
| `role` | `page.get_by_role(role, name=...)` | **首选**，按 ARIA role |
| `text` | `page.get_by_text(text, exact=...)` | 按可见文本 |
| `label` | `page.get_by_label(text)` | 表单字段（有 label） |
| `placeholder` | `page.get_by_placeholder(text)` | 输入框 placeholder |
| `testid` | `page.get_by_test_id(id)` | 有埋点的项目首选 |
| `css` | `page.locator(selector)` | 兜底 |
| `xpath` | `page.locator("xpath=...")` | 最后兜底 |

**优先级**：role > testid > label/placeholder > text > css > xpath
（LLM prompt 里强制要求这个优先级）

---

## 二、Action 方法（操作元素）—— 大约 15 个覆盖 95% 场景

### 导航类
| action | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `goto` | `page.goto(url)` |
| `reload` | `page.reload()` |
| `go_back` | `page.go_back()` |

### 输入类
| action | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `fill` | `locator.fill(value)` |
| `type` | `locator.type(value, delay=...)` （逐字符输入） |
| `clear` | `locator.clear()` |
| `press` | `locator.press(key)` 如 `Enter` `Tab` |

### 点击类
| action | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `click` | `locator.click()` |
| `dblclick` | `locator.dblclick()` |
| `hover` | `locator.hover()` |
| `check` / `uncheck` | `locator.check()` / `locator.uncheck()` |
| `select_option` | `locator.select_option(value)` |
| `upload_file` | `locator.set_input_files(path)` |

### 等待类
| action | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `wait_for` | `locator.wait_for(state="visible/hidden/attached")` |
| `wait_for_url` | `page.wait_for_url(pattern)` |
| `wait_timeout` | `page.wait_for_timeout(ms)` （能不用就不用） |

### 滚动/截图
| action | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `scroll_into_view` | `locator.scroll_into_view_if_needed()` |
| `screenshot` | `page.screenshot()` 或 `locator.screenshot()` |

---

## 三、Assertion 方法（断言）—— 收敛到 ~8 种

| assertion.type | Playwright 调用 |
|---|---|
| `visible` | `expect(locator).to_be_visible()` |
| `hidden` | `expect(locator).to_be_hidden()` |
| `enabled` / `disabled` | `expect(locator).to_be_enabled()` |
| `checked` | `expect(locator).to_be_checked()` |
| `contains_text` | `expect(locator).to_contain_text(text)` |
| `has_text` | `expect(locator).to_have_text(text)` （精确匹配） |
| `has_value` | `expect(locator).to_have_value(value)` |
| `has_count` | `expect(locator).to_have_count(n)` |
| `url_matches` | `expect(page).to_have_url(pattern)` |

---

## 四、整体看就是一个 Dispatcher

执行器本质就是一个大 switch（伪代码）：

```python
def execute(action_json, page):
    loc = resolve_locator(page, action_json.get("locator"))   # 7 选 1
    a = action_json["action"]

    match a:
        case "goto":           page.goto(action_json["value"])
        case "fill":           loc.fill(action_json["value"])
        case "click":          loc.click()
        case "hover":          loc.hover()
        case "press":          loc.press(action_json["value"])
        case "select_option":  loc.select_option(action_json["value"])
        case "wait_for":       loc.wait_for(state=action_json["state"])
        case "assert":         run_assertion(loc, action_json["assertion"])
        ...
    # 每个 case 内部统一打日志、截图、计时
```

**LLM 的工作 = 在这个有限集合里选 + 填参数**，不是"写代码"。

---

## 五、locator 解析也是同一个套路

```python
def resolve_locator(page, loc):
    s = loc["strategy"]
    match s:
        case "role":        return page.get_by_role(loc["role"], name=loc.get("name"))
        case "text":        return page.get_by_text(loc["value"], exact=loc.get("exact", False))
        case "label":       return page.get_by_label(loc["value"])
        case "placeholder": return page.get_by_placeholder(loc["value"])
        case "testid":      return page.get_by_test_id(loc["value"])
        case "css":         return page.locator(loc["value"])
        case "xpath":       return page.locator(f"xpath={loc['value']}")
```

---

## 六、为什么这种收敛是对的

1. **LLM 准确率飙升**：选择题 >> 开放题。给 15 个 action 让它选，比让它写自由代码稳得多。
2. **Prompt 简单**：直接把上面三张表喂给 LLM 当 schema，输出强约束 JSON。
3. **执行器代码量小**：一个文件几百行搞定，不依赖 `exec`。
4. **完全覆盖**：上面这些方法已经能跑常见 Web 测试的 95%+ 场景。剩下 5% 的边缘情况（拖拽、iframe、多 tab）单独加 action 即可，每次扩展只是加一个 case 分支。

---

## 七、所以最终生成的"脚本"其实就是

**一份 JSON + 一个固定的 dispatcher**，等价于动态拼出来的：

```python
page.get_by_role("textbox", name="搜索").fill("playwright")
page.get_by_role("button", name="百度一下").click()
page.locator("#content_left").wait_for(state="visible")
expect(page.locator("#content_left")).to_contain_text("Playwright")
```

跟你说的"直接写成 `page.get_by_role(...).fill(...)`"**运行时是等价的**，只是中间过了一层有限 DSL，把"自由代码"变成"选择题 + 填空题"。

---

确认这个方法集合大小合适的话，我下一步可以：
1. 把 **Action Schema** 严格写成 JSON Schema（喂给 LLM 强约束输出）
2. 写 **LLM Prompt 模板**（把表 + few-shot 例子组织好）
3. 直接开搭脚手架

你选哪个？

# 我推荐：**有限 DSL + Action JSON**（也就是前面说的方案 B + 收敛后的方法集）

理由我直接给结论，不再展开论证：

---

## 推荐方案

**架构**：
```
自然语言 → LLM → Action JSON（受 schema 约束）→ Dispatcher → Playwright
                      ↓
                 缓存到本地
                      ↓
              额外导出 .py 给人看
```

**LLM 的角色**：在 ~15 个 action × ~7 个 locator 策略里做"选择题 + 填空题"，不写自由代码。

---

## 为什么是它

1. **安全**：不 `exec` 任何字符串，schema 不通过直接拒绝
2. **稳**：LLM 做选择题准确率远高于写代码
3. **可观测**：字段级日志天然满足你"打印 locator + action"的核心诉求
4. **可自愈**：定位失败时只换 locator 字段，其他不动
5. **可缓存**：单步独立，改一处不影响其他
6. **够用**：15 个 action 覆盖 95%+ 场景，不够再加 case 分支即可
7. **还是有可读脚本**：额外导出 `.py`，人审 / 外部复用都不耽误

---

## 什么情况下我不推荐它

- 你的用例**极其简单**且数量很少（<20 条），只是临时玩玩 → 直接让 LLM 生成 `.py` 跑一次性脚本更省事
- 你**完全不需要稳定回归**，每次都重新让 LLM 翻译 → 不用做缓存层，整个架构可以塌缩

但只要你想做"**可维护、可回归、可扩展**的 UI 自动化框架"，这个方案就是当前最稳的选择。

---

## 下一步建议

按这个顺序推进，每步都能独立验证：

1. **Action Schema 定稿**（半小时）— 把 action / locator / assertion 三张表写成 JSON Schema
2. **LLM Prompt 模板**（半小时）— 决定翻译质量的核心
3. **跑通一个最小闭环**（核心代码，先不做缓存和自愈）—— 一个用例从 YAML 跑到浏览器
4. **加缓存层**
5. **加日志 & 报告**
6. **加自愈**

**建议从第 1 步开始**。要不要我直接把 Action Schema 写出来？

---

## Step 2: Action Schema (Pydantic 模型)

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:28:11Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""Action Schema —— LLM 输出的契约.

LLM 只能在以下集合里做"选择题":
  - Locator strategy: 7 种
  - Action: ~15 种
  - Assertion type: ~8 种
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any, Literal, Optional, Union

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, model_validator


# ---------- Locator ----------
LocatorStrategy = Literal[
    "role", "text", "label", "placeholder", "testid", "css", "xpath"
]


class Locator(BaseModel):
    strategy: LocatorStrategy = Field(..., description="定位策略, 优先 role > testid > label/placeholder > text > css > xpath")
    # role 策略专用
    role: Optional[str] = Field(None, description='ARIA role, 如 button/textbox/link, 仅 strategy=role 时使用')
    name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="role 的可访问名 (accessible name)")
    # 其他策略共用
    value: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="text/label/placeholder/testid/css/xpath 的字符串值")
    exact: bool = Field(False, description="text 匹配是否精确")
    nth: Optional[int] = Field(None, description="同名元素的索引, 从 0 开始")
    # 兜底定位器, 主定位失败时按顺序尝试
    fallback: list["Locator"] = Field(default_factory=list)

    @model_validator(mode="after")
    def _check(self) -> "Locator":
        if self.strategy == "role":
            if not self.role:
                raise ValueError("strategy=role 必须提供 role 字段")
        else:
            if not self.value:
                raise ValueError(f"strategy={self.strategy} 必须提供 value 字段")
        return self


Locator.model_rebuild()


# ---------- Assertion ----------
AssertionType = Literal[
    "visible", "hidden", "enabled", "disabled", "checked",
    "contains_text", "has_text", "has_value", "has_count", "url_matches",
]


class Assertion(BaseModel):
    type: AssertionType
    expected: Optional[Union[str, int, bool]] = None
    ignore_case: bool = False


# ---------- Action ----------
ActionType = Literal[
    # 导航
    "goto", "reload", "go_back",
    # 输入
    "fill", "type", "clear", "press",
    # 点击
    "click", "dblclick", "hover", "check", "uncheck", "select_option", "upload_file",
    # 等待
    "wait_for", "wait_for_url", "wait_timeout",
    # 其他
    "scroll_into_view", "screenshot",
    # 断言
    "assert",
]


class Action(BaseModel):
    step_no: int
    raw_text: str = Field(..., description="原始自然语言步骤, 用于日志展示")
    action: ActionType
    locator: Optional[Locator] = None
    value: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="fill/type/press/select_option/goto 等需要的参数")
    state: Optional[Literal["visible", "hidden", "attached", "detached"]] = None
    assertion: Optional[Assertion] = None
    timeout_ms: Optional[int] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None

    @model_validator(mode="after")
    def _check(self) -> "Action":
        needs_locator = {
            "fill", "type", "clear", "press", "click", "dblclick", "hover",
            "check", "uncheck", "select_option", "upload_file",
            "wait_for", "scroll_into_view",
        }
        needs_value = {"goto", "fill", "type", "press", "select_option", "upload_file", "wait_for_url", "wait_timeout"}

        if self.action in needs_locator and self.locator is None:
            raise ValueError(f"action={self.action} 必须提供 locator")
        if self.action in needs_value and self.value is None:
            raise ValueError(f"action={self.action} 必须提供 value")
        if self.action == "wait_for" and self.state is None:
            self.state = "visible"
        if self.action == "assert" and self.assertion is None:
            raise ValueError("action=assert 必须提供 assertion")
        return self


class CaseMeta(BaseModel):
    case_name: str
    case_hash: str
    url: str
    generated_at: str
    llm_provider: str
    llm_model: str
    steps_count: int


# ---------- 辅助: 导出 JSON Schema 喂给 LLM ----------
def action_json_schema() -> dict[str, Any]:
    """生成用于 LLM structured output 约束的 JSON Schema."""
    return Action.model_json_schema()

```

```

"""LLM Prompt 模板 —— 翻译自然语言步骤到 Action JSON."""

SYSTEM_PROMPT = """\
你是一个 UI 自动化测试助手, 负责把"自然语言测试步骤"翻译成"结构化 Action JSON".

## 严格规则
1. 只输出一个合法 JSON 对象, 不要包裹 markdown 代码块, 不要任何额外文字.
2. JSON 必须严格符合给定 schema, 字段名拼写不能错.
3. 选择 locator 策略时, 严格按以下优先级:
     role > testid > label > placeholder > text > css > xpath
4. 能用 get_by_role 就用 role; 实在无法确定 role/name 时再降级.
5. 不要编造不存在的 DOM 信息, 缺信息时用合理的兜底 (例如 text 或 css 通用选择器).
6. 步骤里出现的引号字符串 (如 "playwright") 是输入值或文案, 原样保留.
7. action 字段只能从枚举集合里选, 不能自己造名字.

## 可用 action 集合
导航: goto, reload, go_back
输入: fill, type, clear, press
点击: click, dblclick, hover, check, uncheck, select_option, upload_file
等待: wait_for, wait_for_url, wait_timeout
其他: scroll_into_view, screenshot
断言: assert  (配合 assertion 字段, type 可选: visible/hidden/enabled/disabled/checked/contains_text/has_text/has_value/has_count/url_matches)

## 可用 locator strategy
role / text / label / placeholder / testid / css / xpath

## 输出字段示例
{
  "step_no": 1,
  "raw_text": "原始步骤文本",
  "action": "fill",
  "locator": {"strategy": "role", "role": "textbox", "name": "搜索"},
  "value": "playwright",
  "timeout_ms": 5000,
  "description": "简短描述"
}
"""

FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES = [
    {
        "input": '步骤: 在搜索框输入 "playwright"\n步骤序号: 1\n目标 URL: https://www.baidu.com',
        "output": {
            "step_no": 1,
            "raw_text": '在搜索框输入 "playwright"',
            "action": "fill",
            "locator": {
                "strategy": "role",
                "role": "textbox",
                "name": "搜索",
                "fallback": [{"strategy": "css", "value": "#kw"}],
            },
            "value": "playwright",
            "description": "在百度搜索框输入查询词",
        },
    },
    {
        "input": '步骤: 点击 "百度一下" 按钮\n步骤序号: 2\n目标 URL: https://www.baidu.com',
        "output": {
            "step_no": 2,
            "raw_text": '点击 "百度一下" 按钮',
            "action": "click",
            "locator": {
                "strategy": "role",
                "role": "button",
                "name": "百度一下",
                "fallback": [{"strategy": "css", "value": "#su"}],
            },
            "description": "点击搜索按钮",
        },
    },
    {
        "input": "步骤: 断言结果列表包含 \"Playwright\"\n步骤序号: 3\n目标 URL: https://www.baidu.com",
        "output": {
            "step_no": 3,
            "raw_text": '断言结果列表包含 "Playwright"',
            "action": "assert",
            "locator": {"strategy": "css", "value": "#content_left"},
            "assertion": {"type": "contains_text", "expected": "Playwright", "ignore_case": True},
            "description": "断言搜索结果包含目标关键词",
        },
    },
]


def build_user_prompt(step_text: str, step_no: int, url: str, page_hint: str | None = None) -> str:
    parts = [
        f"步骤: {step_text}",
        f"步骤序号: {step_no}",
        f"目标 URL: {url}",
    ]
    if page_hint:
        parts.append(f"页面上下文 (DOM 摘要):\n{page_hint}")
    parts.append("\n请输出一个符合 schema 的 JSON 对象.")
    return "\n".join(parts)

```

## Step 4: LLM 客户端 (双 Provider)

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:29:06Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""统一 LLM 客户端 —— 支持 Claude 与 OpenAI 兼容协议."""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import re
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any


class BaseLLMClient(ABC):
    @abstractmethod
    def chat_json(self, system: str, examples: list[dict], user: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """调用 LLM, 返回 dict (已解析的 JSON)."""

    @property
    @abstractmethod
    def model(self) -> str: ...

    @property
    @abstractmethod
    def provider(self) -> str: ...


def _extract_json(text: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """从 LLM 回复里提取 JSON 对象, 容忍 \```json 包裹."""
    text = text.strip()
    # 去掉 \``` 包裹
    fence = re.match(r"^\```(?:json)?\s*(.*?)\```$", text, re.DOTALL)
    if fence:
        text = fence.group(1).strip()
    try:
        return json.loads(text)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
        # 退而求其次: 抓第一个 { 到最后一个 }
        start, end = text.find("{"), text.rfind("}")
        if start >= 0 and end > start:
            return json.loads(text[start : end + 1])
        raise


class ClaudeClient(BaseLLMClient):
    def __init__(self, cfg: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        from anthropic import Anthropic

        api_key = os.environ.get(cfg["api_key_env"])
        if not api_key:
            raise RuntimeError(f"环境变量 {cfg['api_key_env']} 未设置")
        self._client = Anthropic(api_key=api_key)
        self._model = cfg["model"]
        self._max_tokens = cfg.get("max_tokens", 2048)
        self._temperature = cfg.get("temperature", 0.0)

    @property
    def model(self) -> str:
        return self._model

    @property
    def provider(self) -> str:
        return "claude"

    def chat_json(self, system: str, examples: list[dict], user: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        messages = []
        for ex in examples:
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": ex["input"]})
            messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": json.dumps(ex["output"], ensure_ascii=False)})
        messages.append({"role": "user", "content": user})

        resp = self._client.messages.create(
            model=self._model,
            max_tokens=self._max_tokens,
            temperature=self._temperature,
            system=system,
            messages=messages,
        )
        text = "".join(b.text for b in resp.content if getattr(b, "type", "") == "text")
        return _extract_json(text)


class OpenAIClient(BaseLLMClient):
    def __init__(self, cfg: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        from openai import OpenAI

        api_key = os.environ.get(cfg["api_key_env"])
        if not api_key:
            raise RuntimeError(f"环境变量 {cfg['api_key_env']} 未设置")
        self._client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key, base_url=cfg.get("base_url"))
        self._model = cfg["model"]
        self._max_tokens = cfg.get("max_tokens", 2048)
        self._temperature = cfg.get("temperature", 0.0)

    @property
    def model(self) -> str:
        return self._model

    @property
    def provider(self) -> str:
        return "openai"

    def chat_json(self, system: str, examples: list[dict], user: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        messages: list[dict[str, Any]] = [{"role": "system", "content": system}]
        for ex in examples:
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": ex["input"]})
            messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": json.dumps(ex["output"], ensure_ascii=False)})
        messages.append({"role": "user", "content": user})

        resp = self._client.chat.completions.create(
            model=self._model,
            max_tokens=self._max_tokens,
            temperature=self._temperature,
            messages=messages,
            response_format={"type": "json_object"},
        )
        text = resp.choices[0].message.content or ""
        return _extract_json(text)


def build_llm_client(llm_cfg: dict[str, Any]) -> BaseLLMClient:
    provider = llm_cfg.get("provider", "claude")
    if provider == "claude":
        return ClaudeClient(llm_cfg["claude"])
    if provider == "openai":
        return OpenAIClient(llm_cfg["openai"])
    raise ValueError(f"未知 LLM provider: {provider}")

```

## Step 5: 用例解析

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:29:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""自然语言用例解析."""
from __future__ import annotations

import hashlib
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path

import yaml


@dataclass
class NaturalCase:
    name: str
    url: str
    steps: list[str]
    source_path: Path

    def step_hash(self, step_text: str) -> str:
        h = hashlib.md5()
        h.update(self.name.encode())
        h.update(self.url.encode())
        h.update(step_text.encode())
        return h.hexdigest()[:10]

    @property
    def case_hash(self) -> str:
        h = hashlib.md5()
        h.update(self.name.encode())
        h.update(self.url.encode())
        for s in self.steps:
            h.update(s.encode())
        return h.hexdigest()[:10]


def load_case(path: str | Path) -> NaturalCase:
    p = Path(path)
    data = yaml.safe_load(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    name = data.get("name")
    url = data.get("url")
    steps = data.get("steps") or []
    if not name or not url or not steps:
        raise ValueError(f"用例文件 {p} 缺少 name/url/steps")
    return NaturalCase(name=name, url=url, steps=[str(s).strip() for s in steps], source_path=p)

```

## Step 6: 翻译层 + 缓存

```python
"""脚本缓存层 —— 单步独立落盘."""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Optional

from .schema import Action, CaseMeta


class ScriptCache:
    def __init__(self, root: str | Path) -> None:
        self.root = Path(root)
        self.root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    def case_dir(self, case_name: str) -> Path:
        d = self.root / _safe(case_name)
        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        return d

    def step_path(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Path:
        return self.case_dir(case_name) / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{step_hash}.json"

    def load_step(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Optional[Action]:
        p = self.step_path(case_name, step_no, step_hash)
        if not p.exists():
            return None
        try:
            return Action.model_validate_json(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception:
            return None

    def save_step(self, case_name: str, step_hash: str, action: Action) -> Path:
        p = self.step_path(case_name, action.step_no, step_hash)
        p.write_text(action.model_dump_json(indent=2, exclude_none=True), encoding="utf-8")
        return p

    def save_meta(self, case_name: str, meta: CaseMeta) -> Path:
        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "case.meta.json"
        p.write_text(meta.model_dump_json(indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        return p

    def export_python_script(self, case_name: str, url: str, actions: list[Action]) -> Path:
        """额外导出一份纯 Playwright 脚本, 供人审 / 外部复用."""
        lines = [
            "# Auto-generated. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — edit the YAML and re-generate.",
            f"# Case: {case_name}",
            "",
            "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect",
            "",
            f"def run(page):",
            f'    page.goto("{url}")',
        ]
        for a in actions:
            lines.append(f"    # Step {a.step_no}: {a.raw_text}")
            lines.append(f"    {_render_action(a)}")
        lines.extend([
            "",
            'if __name__ == "__main__":',
            "    with sync_playwright() as p:",
            "        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)",
            "        page = browser.new_page()",
            "        run(page)",
            "        browser.close()",
            "",
        ])
        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "playwright_script.py"
        p.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
        return p


def _safe(name: str) -> str:
    return "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_." else "_" for c in name)


def _render_locator(loc: Any) -> str:
    s = loc.strategy
    if s == "role":
        if loc.name:
            return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}", name="{loc.name}")'
        return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}")'
    if s == "text":
        return f'page.get_by_text("{loc.value}", exact={loc.exact})'
    if s == "label":
        return f'page.get_by_label("{loc.value}")'
    if s == "placeholder":
        return f'page.get_by_placeholder("{loc.value}")'
    if s == "testid":
        return f'page.get_by_test_id("{loc.value}")'
    if s == "css":
        return f'page.locator("{loc.value}")'
    if s == "xpath":
        return f'page.locator("xpath={loc.value}")'
    return "page.locator('body')"


def _render_action(a: Action) -> str:
    loc_expr = _render_locator(a.locator) if a.locator else None
    act = a.action
    if act == "goto":
        return f'page.goto("{a.value}")'
    if act == "reload":
        return "page.reload()"
    if act == "go_back":
        return "page.go_back()"
    if act in {"fill", "type"}:
        return f'{loc_expr}.{act}("{a.value}")'
    if act == "clear":
        return f"{loc_expr}.clear()"
    if act == "press":
        return f'{loc_expr}.press("{a.value}")'
    if act in {"click", "dblclick", "hover", "check", "uncheck", "scroll_into_view"}:
        method = "scroll_into_view_if_needed" if act == "scroll_into_view" else act
        return f"{loc_expr}.{method}()"
    if act == "select_option":
        return f'{loc_expr}.select_option("{a.value}")'
    if act == "upload_file":
        return f'{loc_expr}.set_input_files("{a.value}")'
    if act == "wait_for":
        return f'{loc_expr}.wait_for(state="{a.state or "visible"}")'
    if act == "wait_for_url":
        return f'page.wait_for_url("{a.value}")'
    if act == "wait_timeout":
        return f"page.wait_for_timeout({a.value})"
    if act == "screenshot":
        return "page.screenshot()"
    if act == "assert" and a.assertion:
        t = a.assertion.type
        exp = a.assertion.expected
        if t == "visible":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_visible()"
        if t == "hidden":          return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_hidden()"
        if t == "enabled":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_enabled()"
        if t == "disabled":        return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_disabled()"
        if t == "checked":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_checked()"
        if t == "contains_text":   return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_contain_text("{exp}")'
        if t == "has_text":        return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_have_text("{exp}")'
        if t == "has_value":       return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_have_value("{exp}")'
        if t == "has_count":       return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_have_count({exp})"
        if t == "url_matches":     return f'expect(page).to_have_url("{exp}")'
    return "# unsupported action"

```

```python
"""翻译层: 自然语言步骤 → Action JSON (经过 LLM + schema 校验)."""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Optional

from .cache import ScriptCache
from .llm_client import BaseLLMClient
from .parser import NaturalCase
from .prompts import FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES, SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_user_prompt
from .schema import Action


class Translator:
    def __init__(
        self,
        llm: BaseLLMClient,
        cache: ScriptCache,
        force_regenerate: bool = False,
    ) -> None:
        self.llm = llm
        self.cache = cache
        self.force = force_regenerate

    def translate_step(
        self,
        case: NaturalCase,
        step_no: int,
        step_text: str,
        page_hint: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> tuple[Action, bool]:
        """返回 (action, hit_cache)."""
        step_hash = case.step_hash(step_text)

        if not self.force:
            cached = self.cache.load_step(case.name, step_no, step_hash)
            if cached is not None:
                return cached, True

        user_prompt = build_user_prompt(step_text, step_no, case.url, page_hint)
        raw = self.llm.chat_json(SYSTEM_PROMPT, FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES, user_prompt)
        # 强校验, 不符合 schema 立即报错
        raw["step_no"] = step_no
        raw["raw_text"] = step_text
        action = Action.model_validate(raw)
        self.cache.save_step(case.name, step_hash, action)
        return action, False

```

"""把 Locator JSON 解析成 Playwright Locator 对象."""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any

from .schema import Locator


def resolve_locator(page: Any, loc: Locator):
    """返回 Playwright Locator. 失败时按 fallback 依次重试."""
    candidates = [loc] + list(loc.fallback or [])
    last_err: Exception | None = None
    for cand in candidates:
        try:
            return _single(page, cand)
        except Exception as e:
            last_err = e
            continue
    raise RuntimeError(f"无法解析 locator: {loc}, last error: {last_err}")


def _single(page: Any, loc: Locator):
    s = loc.strategy
    if s == "role":
        kwargs = {}
        if loc.name:
            kwargs["name"] = loc.name
        l = page.get_by_role(loc.role, **kwargs)
    elif s == "text":
        l = page.get_by_text(loc.value, exact=loc.exact)
    elif s == "label":
        l = page.get_by_label(loc.value)
    elif s == "placeholder":
        l = page.get_by_placeholder(loc.value)
    elif s == "testid":
        l = page.get_by_test_id(loc.value)
    elif s == "css":
        l = page.locator(loc.value)
    elif s == "xpath":
        l = page.locator(f"xpath={loc.value}")
    else:
        raise ValueError(f"未知 locator strategy: {s}")
    if loc.nth is not None:
        l = l.nth(loc.nth)
    return l


def locator_repr(loc: Locator) -> str:
    """日志友好的 locator 字符串."""
    s = loc.strategy
    if s == "role":
        return f'role={loc.role}' + (f'[name="{loc.name}"]' if loc.name else "")
    return f"{s}={loc.value}"

```

```python
"""Action Dispatcher —— 把 Action JSON 翻译成真实的 Playwright 调用."""
from __future__ import annotations

import time
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Optional

from playwright.sync_api import expect

from .locator_resolver import locator_repr, resolve_locator
from .logger import StepLogger
from .schema import Action


@dataclass
class StepResult:
    step_no: int
    raw_text: str
    action: str
    locator_repr: Optional[str]
    status: str           # PASS | FAIL
    duration_ms: int
    error: Optional[str] = None
    screenshot: Optional[str] = None
    resolved_html: Optional[str] = None


class Executor:
    def __init__(
        self,
        page: Any,
        reports_dir: Path,
        logger: StepLogger,
        screenshot_every: bool = True,
        screenshot_on_failure: bool = True,
        default_timeout_ms: int = 10000,
    ) -> None:
        self.page = page
        self.reports_dir = reports_dir
        self.reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.logger = logger
        self.shot_every = screenshot_every
        self.shot_fail = screenshot_on_failure
        self.default_timeout = default_timeout_ms

    # ---------- public ----------
    def execute(self, action: Action) -> StepResult:
        t0 = time.time()
        loc_repr = locator_repr(action.locator) if action.locator else None
        resolved_html = None
        status, err = "PASS", None

        try:
            resolved_html = self._dispatch(action)
        except Exception as e:
            status, err = "FAIL", f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"

        duration = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
        shot = None
        if status == "FAIL" and self.shot_fail or status == "PASS" and self.shot_every:
            shot = self._screenshot(action.step_no, status)

        result = StepResult(
            step_no=action.step_no,
            raw_text=action.raw_text,
            action=action.action,
            locator_repr=loc_repr,
            status=status,
            duration_ms=duration,
            error=err,
            screenshot=str(shot) if shot else None,
            resolved_html=resolved_html,
        )
        self.logger.log_step(result)
        return result

    # ---------- private ----------
    def _dispatch(self, a: Action) -> Optional[str]:
        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
        loc = resolve_locator(self.page, a.locator) if a.locator else None
        resolved = None
        if loc is not None:
            try:
                resolved = loc.first.evaluate("el => el.outerHTML.slice(0, 200)")
            except Exception:
                resolved = None

        act = a.action
        if act == "goto":
            self.page.goto(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "reload":
            self.page.reload(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "go_back":
            self.page.go_back(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "fill":
            loc.fill(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "type":
            loc.type(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "clear":
            loc.clear(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "press":
            loc.press(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "click":
            loc.click(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "dblclick":
            loc.dblclick(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "hover":
            loc.hover(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "check":
            loc.check(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "uncheck":
            loc.uncheck(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "select_option":
            loc.select_option(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "upload_file":
            loc.set_input_files(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "wait_for":
            loc.wait_for(state=a.state or "visible", timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "wait_for_url":
            self.page.wait_for_url(a.value, timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "wait_timeout":
            self.page.wait_for_timeout(int(a.value))
        elif act == "scroll_into_view":
            loc.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=timeout)
        elif act == "screenshot":
            pass
        elif act == "assert":
            self._assert(loc, a)
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 action: {act}")

        return resolved

    def _assert(self, loc, a: Action) -> None:
        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
        t = a.assertion.type
        exp = a.assertion.expected
        ignore_case = a.assertion.ignore_case
        if t == "visible":          expect(loc).to_be_visible(timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "hidden":         expect(loc).to_be_hidden(timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "enabled":        expect(loc).to_be_enabled(timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "disabled":       expect(loc).to_be_disabled(timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "checked":        expect(loc).to_be_checked(timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "contains_text":  expect(loc).to_contain_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "has_text":       expect(loc).to_have_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "has_value":      expect(loc).to_have_value(str(exp), timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "has_count":      expect(loc).to_have_count(int(exp), timeout=timeout)
        elif t == "url_matches":    expect(self.page).to_have_url(str(exp), timeout=timeout)
        else:
            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 assertion: {t}")

    def _screenshot(self, step_no: int, status: str) -> Path:
        path = self.reports_dir / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{status.lower()}.png"
        try:
            self.page.screenshot(path=str(path), full_page=False)
        except Exception:
            pass
        return path

```

"""结构化日志 —— 每步打印 locator/action/status/screenshot."""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

from rich.console import Console

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from .executor import StepResult


class StepLogger:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.console = Console()
        self._results: list["StepResult"] = []

    # ---------- case 层 ----------
    def case_start(self, case_name: str, url: str, cache_hits: int, total: int) -> None:
        self.console.rule(f"[bold cyan]Case: {case_name}")
        self.console.print(f"URL    : [cyan]{url}[/cyan]")
        self.console.print(f"Cache  : [green]{cache_hits}/{total} HIT[/green]")
        self.console.print("")

    def case_end(self, total_ms: int, report_path: str) -> None:
        passed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "PASS")
        failed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "FAIL")
        color = "green" if failed == 0 else "red"
        self.console.rule(style=color)
        self.console.print(f"Total: [{color}]{passed} passed, {failed} failed[/{color}]   Duration: {total_ms}ms")
        self.console.print(f"Report: [cyan]{report_path}[/cyan]")
        self.console.rule(style=color)

    # ---------- step 层 ----------
    def log_translate(self, step_no: int, step_text: str, cache_hit: bool) -> None:
        tag = "[green]CACHE HIT[/green]" if cache_hit else "[yellow]LLM CALL[/yellow]"
        self.console.print(f"[dim]>> translating step {step_no}[/dim] {tag}  [white]{step_text}[/white]")

    def log_step(self, r: "StepResult") -> None:
        self._results.append(r)
        color = "green" if r.status == "PASS" else "red"
        mark = "✔" if r.status == "PASS" else "✘"
        self.console.print(f"[bold]{mark} Step {r.step_no:02d}[/bold] [white]{r.raw_text}[/white]")
        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Action  : [cyan]{r.action}[/cyan]")
        if r.locator_repr:
            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Locator : [magenta]{r.locator_repr}[/magenta]")
        if r.resolved_html:
            html = r.resolved_html.replace("\n", " ")
            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Resolved: [dim]{html}[/dim]")
        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Status  : [{color}]{r.status}[/{color}] ({r.duration_ms}ms)")
        if r.error:
            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Error   : [red]{r.error}[/red]")
        if r.screenshot:
            self.console.print(f"  └─ Shot    : [dim]{r.screenshot}[/dim]")
        else:
            self.console.print(f"  └─")

    @property
    def results(self) -> list["StepResult"]:
        return self._results

```

"""框架入口.

Usage:
  python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
  python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml --force-regenerate
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import sys
import time
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

import yaml
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

from core.cache import ScriptCache
from core.executor import Executor
from core.llm_client import build_llm_client
from core.logger import StepLogger
from core.parser import load_case
from core.schema import CaseMeta
from core.translator import Translator


def load_config(path: Path) -> dict:
    return yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def main() -> int:
    load_dotenv()

    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("case_file", help="自然语言用例 YAML 路径")
    ap.add_argument("--config", default="config.yaml")
    ap.add_argument("--force-regenerate", action="store_true", help="忽略缓存重新翻译")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    root = Path(__file__).parent
    cfg = load_config(root / args.config)
    if args.force_regenerate:
        cfg["runner"]["force_regenerate"] = True

    case = load_case(args.case_file)
    cache = ScriptCache(root / cfg["runner"]["cache_dir"])

    # 报告目录: reports/<case>_<timestamp>/
    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    reports_dir = root / cfg["runner"]["reports_dir"] / f"{case.name}_{ts}"
    reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    logger = StepLogger()

    # ---- 1. 翻译阶段 ----
    llm = build_llm_client(cfg["llm"])
    translator = Translator(llm, cache, force_regenerate=cfg["runner"]["force_regenerate"])

    actions = []
    cache_hits = 0
    for i, step_text in enumerate(case.steps, start=1):
        action, hit = translator.translate_step(case, i, step_text)
        logger.log_translate(i, step_text, hit)
        actions.append(action)
        if hit:
            cache_hits += 1

    # 写 meta + 导出可读脚本
    cache.save_meta(case.name, CaseMeta(
        case_name=case.name,
        case_hash=case.case_hash,
        url=case.url,
        generated_at=datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
        llm_provider=llm.provider,
        llm_model=llm.model,
        steps_count=len(actions),
    ))
    cache.export_python_script(case.name, case.url, actions)

    # ---- 2. 执行阶段 ----
    logger.case_start(case.name, case.url, cache_hits, len(actions))
    t0 = time.time()

    pw_cfg = cfg["playwright"]
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser_type = getattr(p, pw_cfg["browser"])
        browser = browser_type.launch(headless=pw_cfg["headless"])
        context = browser.new_context(viewport=pw_cfg.get("viewport"))
        page = context.new_page()
        page.set_default_timeout(pw_cfg["default_timeout_ms"])

        page.goto(case.url)

        executor = Executor(
            page=page,
            reports_dir=reports_dir,
            logger=logger,
            screenshot_every=cfg["runner"]["screenshot_on_every_step"],
            screenshot_on_failure=cfg["runner"]["screenshot_on_failure"],
            default_timeout_ms=pw_cfg["default_timeout_ms"],
        )

        any_failed = False
        for action in actions:
            r = executor.execute(action)
            if r.status == "FAIL":
                any_failed = True
                break

        context.close()
        browser.close()

    total_ms = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
    logger.case_end(total_ms, str(reports_dir))
    return 1 if any_failed else 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

## 已完成的最终结构

```
ui_automation/
├── config.yaml              # LLM provider 切换 + Playwright 配置
├── requirements.txt
├── .env.example
├── .gitignore
├── run.py                   # 入口
├── core/
│   ├── schema.py            # Action/Locator/Assertion Pydantic 模型 (强校验)
│   ├── prompts.py           # System prompt + few-shot
│   ├── llm_client.py        # Claude + OpenAI 双 provider
│   ├── parser.py            # YAML → NaturalCase
│   ├── cache.py             # 单步 JSON 缓存 + 导出可读 .py 脚本
│   ├── translator.py        # NL → Action JSON (含 cache hit)
│   ├── locator_resolver.py  # 7 种 strategy 解析 + fallback
│   ├── executor.py          # 15+ action dispatcher + 截图
│   └── logger.py            # rich 结构化日志
├── natural_cases/
│   └── baidu_search.yaml    # 示例用例
├── script_cache/            # (运行后生成) 单步 Action JSON
└── reports/                 # (运行后生成) 截图 + 报告
```

## 跑起来的两步

```bash
# 1. 装依赖
pip install -r requirements.txt
playwright install chromium

# 2. 配置 key (二选一)
cp .env.example .env
# 编辑 .env 填 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 或 OPENAI_API_KEY

# 3. 运行
python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
```

## Step 1: DOM 快照

```python
"""抽取页面可见交互元素的精简快照, 喂给 LLM 提升定位准确率."""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any

# 在浏览器侧执行的 JS, 返回 [{tag, role, name, id, testid, text, placeholder, type}]
_SNAPSHOT_JS = r"""
() => {
  const SEL = 'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]';
  const items = [];
  const seen = new Set();
  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width === 0 || rect.height === 0) return;
    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
    if (style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return;
    const item = {
      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
      id: el.id || '',
      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
    };
    const key = JSON.stringify(item);
    if (seen.has(key)) return;
    seen.add(key);
    items.push(item);
  });
  return items.slice(0, 60);  // 控制 token
}
"""


def snapshot(page: Any, limit: int = 60) -> str:
    """返回一段紧凑文本, 适合塞进 prompt."""
    try:
        items = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or []
    except Exception:
        return ""
    lines = []
    for it in items[:limit]:
        parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
        for k in ("role", "name", "id", "testid", "type", "placeholder"):
            v = it.get(k)
            if v:
                parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
        text = it.get("text") or ""
        lines.append(f"{head} {text}".strip())
    return "\n".join(lines)

```

## Step 2: 自愈机制

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:36:41Z)**_

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-05-21 07:36:59Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""自愈: 步骤执行失败时, 带着当前 DOM 让 LLM 重新翻译, 然后重试.

策略:
  - 仅对"定位/动作类异常"触发(超时/未找到等), 不对断言失败触发.
  - 单步最多 max_retries 次, 成功后回写缓存.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any, Callable, Optional

from .dom_snapshot import snapshot
from .parser import NaturalCase
from .schema import Action
from .translator import Translator


# 触发自愈的异常类型 (Playwright 抛出的多为 TimeoutError / Error)
def _is_locator_failure(err: BaseException) -> bool:
    msg = str(err).lower()
    keywords = ("timeout", "no element", "not found", "waiting for", "strict mode violation", "locator")
    return any(k in msg for k in keywords)


@dataclass
class HealResult:
    healed: bool
    attempts: int
    new_action: Optional[Action] = None
    final_error: Optional[str] = None


class SelfHealer:
    def __init__(
        self,
        translator: Translator,
        page: Any,
        case: NaturalCase,
        max_retries: int = 2,
    ) -> None:
        self.translator = translator
        self.page = page
        self.case = case
        self.max_retries = max_retries

    def heal(
        self,
        action: Action,
        first_error: str,
        execute_fn: Callable[[Action], tuple[bool, Optional[str]]],
    ) -> HealResult:
        """尝试自愈. execute_fn(action) -> (ok, err)."""
        last_err = first_error
        for attempt in range(1, self.max_retries + 1):
            page_hint = snapshot(self.page)
            try:
                new_action, _ = self.translator.translate_step(
                    self.case,
                    action.step_no,
                    action.raw_text,
                    page_hint=page_hint,
                    force_llm=True,  # 自愈时强制重新调 LLM, 忽略缓存
                )
            except Exception as e:
                last_err = f"heal translate failed: {e}"
                continue

            ok, err = execute_fn(new_action)
            if ok:
                # 成功 → 回写缓存(translator 内部已写), 返回
                return HealResult(healed=True, attempts=attempt, new_action=new_action)
            last_err = err or "unknown"

        return HealResult(healed=False, attempts=self.max_retries, final_error=last_err)


def is_healable(err_msg: str) -> bool:
    return _is_locator_failure(Exception(err_msg))

```

```

```python
"""生成 HTML 报告 —— 步骤列表 / 截图 / 耗时 / 状态."""
from __future__ import annotations

import html
from pathlib import Path
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from .executor import StepResult


_TEMPLATE = """<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN"><head><meta charset="utf-8">
<title>UI Auto Report — {case}</title>
<style>
body{{font-family:-apple-system,Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;margin:0;background:#f6f7f9;color:#222}}
header{{background:#1f2937;color:#fff;padding:20px 32px}}
header h1{{margin:0;font-size:20px}}
header .meta{{opacity:.75;font-size:13px;margin-top:6px}}
.summary{{display:flex;gap:24px;padding:16px 32px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb}}
.summary div{{font-size:14px}}
.summary b{{font-size:20px;display:block}}
.pass b{{color:#16a34a}} .heal b{{color:#d97706}} .fail b{{color:#dc2626}}
.steps{{padding:24px 32px}}
.step{{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}}
.step.PASS{{border-left:4px solid #16a34a}}
.step.HEALED{{border-left:4px solid #d97706}}
.step.FAIL{{border-left:4px solid #dc2626}}
.step h3{{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:15px}}
.kv{{font-size:13px;color:#444;margin:4px 0}}
.kv code{{background:#f3f4f6;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px}}
.err{{color:#dc2626;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;white-space:pre-wrap;background:#fef2f2;padding:8px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:8px}}
.shot{{margin-top:10px}}
.shot img{{max-width:100%;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:4px}}
.badge{{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}}
.badge.PASS{{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d}}
.badge.HEALED{{background:#fef3c7;color:#a16207}}
.badge.FAIL{{background:#fee2e2;color:#b91c1c}}
</style></head><body>
<header>
  <h1>UI Auto Report</h1>
  <div class="meta">Case: <b>{case}</b> &nbsp;|&nbsp; URL: {url} &nbsp;|&nbsp; Duration: {duration}ms</div>
</header>
<div class="summary">
  <div class="pass"><b>{passed}</b>Passed</div>
  <div class="heal"><b>{healed}</b>Healed</div>
  <div class="fail"><b>{failed}</b>Failed</div>
  <div><b>{total}</b>Total</div>
</div>
<div class="steps">
{steps_html}
</div>
</body></html>
"""


def _step_html(r: "StepResult", report_root: Path) -> str:
    err_html = f'<div class="err">{html.escape(r.error)}</div>' if r.error else ""
    shot_html = ""
    if r.screenshot:
        try:
            rel = Path(r.screenshot).relative_to(report_root)
        except ValueError:
            rel = Path(r.screenshot).name
        shot_html = f'<div class="shot"><img src="{rel}" alt="screenshot"/></div>'
    heal_tag = f' (healed×{r.heal_attempts})' if r.status == "HEALED" else ""
    return f"""<div class="step {r.status}">
  <h3>Step {r.step_no:02d} · <span class="badge {r.status}">{r.status}{heal_tag}</span> · {html.escape(r.raw_text)}</h3>
  <div class="kv">Action: <code>{html.escape(r.action)}</code></div>
  <div class="kv">Locator: <code>{html.escape(r.locator_repr or '-')}</code></div>
  <div class="kv">Resolved: <code>{html.escape((r.resolved_html or '-')[:200])}</code></div>
  <div class="kv">Duration: {r.duration_ms}ms</div>
  {err_html}
  {shot_html}
</div>"""


def render_report(
    case_name: str,
    url: str,
    duration_ms: int,
    results: list["StepResult"],
    out_dir: Path,
) -> Path:
    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    passed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "PASS")
    healed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "HEALED")
    failed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "FAIL")
    steps_html = "\n".join(_step_html(r, out_dir) for r in results)
    html_text = _TEMPLATE.format(
        case=html.escape(case_name),
        url=html.escape(url),
        duration=duration_ms,
        passed=passed,
        healed=healed,
        failed=failed,
        total=len(results),
        steps_html=steps_html,
    )
    path = out_dir / "index.html"
    path.write_text(html_text, encoding="utf-8")
    return path

```

```python
"""框架入口.

单用例:    python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
批量:      python run.py natural_cases/
并行:      python run.py natural_cases/ --workers 4
强制重译:  python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml --force-regenerate
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import sys
import time
from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor, as_completed
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

import yaml
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

from core.cache import ScriptCache
from core.executor import Executor
from core.llm_client import build_llm_client
from core.logger import StepLogger
from core.parser import load_case
from core.report import render_report
from core.schema import CaseMeta
from core.self_heal import SelfHealer
from core.translator import Translator


def load_config(path: Path) -> dict:
    return yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def discover_cases(path: Path) -> list[Path]:
    if path.is_file():
        return [path]
    if path.is_dir():
        return sorted([p for p in path.glob("*.y*ml") if p.is_file()])
    raise FileNotFoundError(path)


def run_one_case(case_file: str, config_file: str, force_regenerate: bool) -> dict:
    """单用例完整执行. 返回汇总信息(供并行聚合)."""
    load_dotenv()
    root = Path(__file__).parent
    cfg = load_config(root / config_file)
    if force_regenerate:
        cfg["runner"]["force_regenerate"] = True

    case = load_case(case_file)
    cache = ScriptCache(root / cfg["runner"]["cache_dir"])

    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    safe_name = "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_." else "_" for c in case.name)
    reports_dir = root / cfg["runner"]["reports_dir"] / f"{safe_name}_{ts}"
    reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    logger = StepLogger()
    llm = build_llm_client(cfg["llm"])
    translator = Translator(llm, cache, force_regenerate=cfg["runner"]["force_regenerate"])

    # ---- 1. 预翻译(不带 DOM 上下文) ----
    actions = []
    cache_hits = 0
    for i, step_text in enumerate(case.steps, start=1):
        action, hit = translator.translate_step(case, i, step_text)
        logger.log_translate(i, step_text, hit)
        actions.append(action)
        if hit:
            cache_hits += 1

    cache.save_meta(case.name, CaseMeta(
        case_name=case.name,
        case_hash=case.case_hash,
        url=case.url,
        generated_at=datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
        llm_provider=llm.provider,
        llm_model=llm.model,
        steps_count=len(actions),
    ))
    cache.export_python_script(case.name, case.url, actions)

    # ---- 2. 执行 ----
    logger.case_start(case.name, case.url, cache_hits, len(actions))
    t0 = time.time()

    pw_cfg = cfg["playwright"]
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser_type = getattr(p, pw_cfg["browser"])
        browser = browser_type.launch(headless=pw_cfg["headless"])
        context = browser.new_context(viewport=pw_cfg.get("viewport"))
        page = context.new_page()
        page.set_default_timeout(pw_cfg["default_timeout_ms"])

        page.goto(case.url)

        healer = SelfHealer(translator, page, case) if cfg["runner"].get("self_heal") else None
        executor = Executor(
            page=page,
            reports_dir=reports_dir,
            logger=logger,
            screenshot_every=cfg["runner"]["screenshot_on_every_step"],
            screenshot_on_failure=cfg["runner"]["screenshot_on_failure"],
            default_timeout_ms=pw_cfg["default_timeout_ms"],
            healer=healer,
        )

        any_failed = False
        for action in actions:
            r = executor.execute(action)
            if r.status == "FAIL":
                any_failed = True
                break

        context.close()
        browser.close()

    total_ms = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
    report_path = render_report(case.name, case.url, total_ms, logger.results, reports_dir)
    logger.case_end(total_ms, str(report_path))

    return {
        "case": case.name,
        "failed": any_failed,
        "duration_ms": total_ms,
        "report": str(report_path),
        "passed": sum(1 for r in logger.results if r.status == "PASS"),
        "healed": sum(1 for r in logger.results if r.status == "HEALED"),
        "failed_count": sum(1 for r in logger.results if r.status == "FAIL"),
    }


def main() -> int:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("target", help="用例文件或目录")
    ap.add_argument("--config", default="config.yaml")
    ap.add_argument("--force-regenerate", action="store_true")
    ap.add_argument("--workers", type=int, default=1, help="并行进程数, 1=串行")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    cases = discover_cases(Path(args.target))
    if not cases:
        print(f"未发现用例: {args.target}", file=sys.stderr)
        return 2

    print(f"Discovered {len(cases)} case(s), workers={args.workers}")
    results = []

    if args.workers <= 1 or len(cases) == 1:
        for c in cases:
            results.append(run_one_case(str(c), args.config, args.force_regenerate))
    else:
        with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=args.workers) as ex:
            futures = {
                ex.submit(run_one_case, str(c), args.config, args.force_regenerate): c
                for c in cases
            }
            for fut in as_completed(futures):
                results.append(fut.result())

    # 汇总
    print("\n========== SUMMARY ==========")
    for r in results:
        flag = "FAIL" if r["failed"] else "PASS"
        print(f"  [{flag}] {r['case']}  pass={r['passed']} heal={r['healed']} fail={r['failed_count']}  {r['duration_ms']}ms  → {r['report']}")
    any_failed = any(r["failed"] for r in results)
    return 1 if any_failed else 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

```

## 本次补充的四块

| 模块 | 文件 | 关键点 |
|---|---|---|
| **DOM 快照** | `core/dom_snapshot.py` | 浏览器侧 JS 抽取可见交互元素 ≤60 条，给 LLM 当上下文 |
| **自愈机制** | `core/self_heal.py` + Executor 集成 | 步骤失败 → 带当前 DOM 让 LLM 重新出 locator → 重试 N 次 → 成功后回写缓存 |
| **HTML 报告** | `core/report.py` | 每个 case 一份 `index.html`，含状态徽章/截图/错误堆栈/耗时 |
| **多用例并行** | `run.py` 重写 | 支持文件 / 目录两种入参，`--workers N` 走 ProcessPool 并行 |

## 整体最终结构

```
ui_automation/
├── config.yaml
├── requirements.txt
├── .env.example  /  .gitignore
├── run.py                   # 入口 (单/批量/并行)
├── core/
│   ├── schema.py            # Pydantic Action/Locator/Assertion
│   ├── prompts.py           # System + few-shot
│   ├── llm_client.py        # Claude + OpenAI
│   ├── parser.py            # YAML 用例解析
│   ├── translator.py        # NL → Action JSON (cache aware, force_llm 自愈用)
│   ├── cache.py             # 单步落盘 + 导出 .py
│   ├── locator_resolver.py  # 7 种 strategy + fallback
│   ├── dom_snapshot.py      # 浏览器 DOM 摘要
│   ├── executor.py          # Dispatcher + 自愈接入 + 截图
│   ├── self_heal.py         # 失败重翻译重试
│   ├── logger.py            # rich 日志 (PASS/HEALED/FAIL 三态)
│   └── report.py            # HTML 报告
├── natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
├── script_cache/  (运行后生成)
└── reports/       (运行后生成, 含 index.html + 截图)
```

## 使用速查

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
playwright install chromium
cp .env.example .env  # 填一个 KEY 即可

# 单用例
python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml

# 批量 + 并行
python run.py natural_cases/ --workers 4

# 忽略缓存全部重新翻译
python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml --force-regenerate
```

## 自愈触发条件（自动判定）

`self_heal.py` 里 `_is_locator_failure()` 根据异常关键字判断：包含 `timeout / no element / not found / locator / strict mode violation` 等就认为是定位类失败，触发自愈；断言失败 (`assert` action) 不触发自愈 —— 是产品 bug，不应该被掩盖。

## 现在有 6 条用例，覆盖度如下

| 用例 | 覆盖的 action / 断言 | 关键看点 |
|---|---|---|
| `baidu_search.yaml` | fill, click, wait_for, contains_text | 基础冒烟 |
| `github_search.yaml` | click, fill, **press(Enter)**, **url_matches**, contains_text | 键盘输入 + URL 断言 |
| `login_success.yaml` | fill×2, click, wait_for_url, contains_text, **visible 断言** | 完整登录流，role 定位表单 |
| `login_failure.yaml` | fill×2, click, contains_text, url_matches | 负向断言（验证错误提示） |
| `saucedemo_purchase.yaml` | fill×多, click×多, 多次断言 | **长链路 14 步**，最考验 locator 鲁棒性 + 缓存 |
| `dropdown_checkbox.yaml` | **select_option**, **has_value** | 下拉框选择 |

## 推荐验证顺序

```bash
# 1. 最简单, 先确认链路通
python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml

# 2. 表单登录, 验证 role 定位准确度
python run.py natural_cases/login_success.yaml
python run.py natural_cases/login_failure.yaml

# 3. 长链路, 验证缓存有效性 (第二次跑应该全部 CACHE HIT)
python run.py natural_cases/saucedemo_purchase.yaml
python run.py natural_cases/saucedemo_purchase.yaml   # 看 cache hits=14/14

# 4. 并行跑全部
python run.py natural_cases/ --workers 3

# 5. 看 HTML 报告
open reports/<最新目录>/index.html
```

## 检查清单（跑完后该看的产物）

- **`script_cache/<用例名>/step_001_xxx.json`** —— LLM 翻译出的 Action JSON，可直接 review
- **`script_cache/<用例名>/playwright_script.py`** —— 自动导出的等价 Playwright 代码，给人审
- **`reports/<用例名>_<时间>/index.html`** —— 可视化报告，每步截图 + 状态徽章
- **控制台日志** —— 每步 5 行结构化输出（Action / Locator / Resolved / Status / Shot）

## 如果想故意触发"自愈"

把某个 `script_cache/.../step_xxx.json` 里的 locator 改成一个错的（比如 `"value": "#wrong_id"`），下次执行该步会失败 → 触发自愈 → 带 DOM 让 LLM 重新出一个 → 重试 → 成功后回写。HTML 报告里能看到 `HEALED (healed×N)` 徽章。

# 测试上手 + 用例编写规范

## 一、5 分钟跑通最简流程

```bash
# 1. 装依赖 (在项目根目录)
cd /Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation
pip install -r requirements.txt
playwright install chromium

# 2. 配 API Key
cp .env.example .env
# 用编辑器打开 .env, 填一个就够:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxx     (如果 config.yaml 用 claude)
#   OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx            (如果 config.yaml 改成 openai)

# 3. 跑一条已有的最简用例
python run.py natural_cases/baidu_search.yaml
```

跑通后你会看到：
- 浏览器自动打开 → 自动操作
- 终端逐步打印 5 行日志（Action / Locator / Resolved / Status / Shot）
- `script_cache/百度搜索playwright/` 里生成 4 个 step JSON + 1 个 `playwright_script.py`
- `reports/百度搜索playwright_<时间>/index.html` 可以在浏览器打开看

---

## 二、用例文件长什么样

**就一个 YAML 文件，三个字段**：

```yaml
name: 我的用例名           # 必填, 唯一, 中文OK
url:  https://起始页面     # 必填, 浏览器先打开它
steps:                    # 必填, 列表, 每行一个自然语言步骤
  - 第一步要做什么
  - 第二步要做什么
  - 断言XXX
```

放在 `natural_cases/` 目录下，扩展名 `.yaml` 或 `.yml` 都行。

---

## 三、写好步骤的 6 条黄金法则

### ① 一步只做一件事
```yaml
# ✅ 好
- 在用户名输入框输入 "tomsmith"
- 在密码输入框输入 "SuperSecretPassword!"
- 点击 "Login" 按钮

# ❌ 别这么写 (LLM 翻译会乱)
- 输入用户名和密码并点击登录
```

### ② 引号里写"原文本"
按钮文字、输入值、断言关键词 → **用英文双引号**包起来，LLM 知道这是字面值不要改：
```yaml
- 点击 "百度一下" 按钮       # "百度一下" 是按钮文字
- 在搜索框输入 "playwright"  # "playwright" 是输入值
- 断言页面包含 "登录成功"     # "登录成功" 是要找的文本
```

### ③ 描述清"哪个元素 + 做什么"
LLM 主要靠你的描述选 locator，所以两点要清楚：

| 模板 | 例子 |
|---|---|
| 动作 + 元素特征 | "**点击** 顶部的 **登录** 按钮" |
| 在 X 输入 Y | "在 **用户名** 输入框输入 **'admin'**" |
| 选择 X 的 Y 选项 | "在下拉框选择 **'Option 2'**" |

**元素特征**优先级（写得越靠前 LLM 越准）：
1. 文案（"登录"按钮） — 最稳
2. 位置/角色（顶部、表单中、第一个）
3. 类型（输入框、按钮、链接、下拉框）

### ④ 断言要明确"断什么"
```yaml
# ✅ 各种断言写法
- 断言页面包含文本 "登录成功"
- 断言 URL 包含 "/dashboard"
- 断言 "Logout" 按钮可见
- 断言下拉框的值为 "2"
- 断言购物车列表中有 3 个商品
- 断言错误提示 "密码错误" 出现
```

LLM 会自动选对应的 assertion 类型（contains_text / url_matches / visible / has_value / has_count）。

### ⑤ 需要等待时写出来
SPA / 异步加载场景：
```yaml
- 点击 "提交" 按钮
- 等待页面跳转完成              # → wait_for_url
- 等待 "处理中" 消失           # → wait_for(hidden)
- 等待结果列表出现             # → wait_for(visible)
```

### ⑥ 起始页之后才写步骤
YAML 顶部的 `url` 框架会自动 `page.goto()`，所以**不要**再写"打开 XXX 首页"作为第一步。

---

## 四、四种典型场景的模板

### 模板 1：搜索 / 列表查询
```yaml
name: XX网站搜索
url: https://example.com
steps:
  - 在搜索框输入 "关键词"
  - 点击 "搜索" 按钮            # 或: 按下回车键
  - 等待搜索结果出现
  - 断言结果列表包含 "关键词"
```

### 模板 2：登录
```yaml
name: 登录XX系统
url: https://example.com/login
steps:
  - 在用户名输入框输入 "myuser"
  - 在密码输入框输入 "mypass"
  - 点击 "登录" 按钮
  - 等待页面跳转完成
  - 断言 URL 包含 "/home"
  - 断言 "退出" 按钮可见
```

### 模板 3：表单提交
```yaml
name: 提交反馈表单
url: https://example.com/feedback
steps:
  - 在 "姓名" 输入框输入 "张三"
  - 在 "邮箱" 输入框输入 "zhang@test.com"
  - 在下拉框 "类型" 中选择 "建议"
  - 勾选 "同意条款" 复选框
  - 在 "内容" 文本域输入 "测试反馈内容"
  - 点击 "提交" 按钮
  - 断言页面出现 "提交成功" 提示
```

### 模板 4：长链路业务流（电商下单等）
```yaml
name: XX下单流程
url: https://shop.example.com
steps:
  - 登录步骤...
  - 搜索商品...
  - 加入购物车...
  - 去结算...
  - 填写收货信息...
  - 提交订单
  - 断言订单状态为 "待支付"
```

---

## 五、调试技巧

### 看 LLM 翻译得对不对
跑第一次后，**直接打开 `script_cache/<用例名>/step_001_xxx.json`** 看 locator 选的对不对：
```json
{
  "action": "fill",
  "locator": {"strategy": "role", "role": "textbox", "name": "搜索"},
  "value": "playwright"
}
```
- 选对了 → 后面就一直命中缓存了
- 选错了 → 改 YAML 步骤文本让描述更精确，加 `--force-regenerate` 重跑

### 看 Playwright 实际执行了什么
打开 `script_cache/<用例名>/playwright_script.py`，里面是等价的纯 Playwright 代码，可以直接看 / 复制 / 单独跑。

### 跑失败了怎么办
1. 看终端最后一步的 Error 行 → 一般是 locator 没找到
2. 看 `reports/.../step_XX_fail.png` 截图 → 当时页面长什么样
3. 启用了 `self_heal: true` 时，框架会自动带着 DOM 让 LLM 重新出 locator 重试
4. 还是不行 → 把那一步的自然语言写得更具体（加位置、加文案）

### 改了用例文本后
框架按 **用例名+URL+步骤文本** 哈希做缓存键。**改了步骤文本，缓存自动失效**，会重新调 LLM。改了 name 也会失效。

---

建议从你**实际工作中要测的真实业务**写第一条，比直接抄示例学得快。给我一个场景，我可以帮你把第一条 YAML 写出来，比如：

- 你公司的某个内部系统登录 → 进首页 → 看到某个数据
- 某个表单的提交校验
- 你手头正在测的某个功能

直接告诉我场景描述，我把 YAML 给你。或者你自己写一版我帮你 review。
